headline: OpenMontage Automates Professional Video Production Pipelines
lede: This platform transforms AI coding assistants into fully equipped video production studios. By orchestrating local libraries and self-review protocols, it turns natural language requests into finished cinematic montages.

headline: Multi-Market Analysis Engines Deliver Real-Time Trading Insights
lede: Synthesize global market data and social sentiment into structured decision dashboards. This system bridges the gap between institutional-grade quantitative research and accessible, automated retail strategy.

headline: Apple Silicon Gains Native Linux Container Management
lede: Execute OCI-compatible workloads directly on macOS using native virtualization capabilities. This high-performance interface optimizes the local development loop for power users within the Apple ecosystem.

headline: Evidence-Based Hiring Agents Remove Bias From Technical Screening
lede: Standardize resume parsing and performance evaluation with automated scoring models. By analyzing GitHub contributions alongside traditional credentials, this tool provides a transparent view of developer impact.

headline: Reverse Engineer Legacy Sites Into Modern Next.js Applications
lede: Convert static designs into responsive, Tailwind-styled components using automated agentic workflows. This scaffolding tool rebuilds entire front-end codebases with high fidelity and professional structure.

headline: Harness Standardizes Collaborative AI Agent Team Deployments
lede: Move beyond ad-hoc scripts with a repeatable factory approach for defining specialized agent teams. This framework ensures robust orchestration, error handling, and domain-specific skill sets for complex engineering tasks.

headline: Flutter Powers High-Performance Cross-Platform User Interfaces
lede: Leverage a mature, hardware-accelerated SDK to maintain consistent visual aesthetics across mobile, web, and desktop environments. Dart-compiled machine code ensures that rich animations remain fluid and performant.

headline: Headunit Revived Transforms Tablets Into Modern Infotainment Systems
lede: Repurpose spare mobile hardware into fully functional Android Auto receivers for legacy vehicles. This open-source successor offers advanced keymapping and wireless projection for the tinkerer at heart.

headline: Orca Synchronizes Parallel AI Agents in a Unified Workspace
lede: Manage multi-agent terminal sessions and Git worktrees from one command-line hub. This vendor-agnostic environment eliminates context switching, keeping your PRs and CI/CD pipelines perfectly aligned.

headline: Standardize Visual Documentation for Autonomous Coding Agents
lede: Implement a machine-readable format that combines design tokens with qualitative intent. By linter-checking your design files, you ensure that generated code remains consistent with brand identity.
